first_checkpoint_may_only_be_considered_: checkpoint naming / retention / metadata policy is reviewed

loop_plan.expected_evidence: Validated upstream manifest and source diff check.
loop_plan.forbidden: Proceeding with missing, stale, or blocked upstream evidence.
loop_plan.purpose: Validate Step 10O reports, materialized inputs, mask levels, and source immutability.

loop_plan.expected_evidence: Model class, parameter count, and no-checkpoint flags.
loop_plan.purpose: Create a fresh in-memory DiffSBDD model instance for the dry run.

loop_plan.allowed: AdamW with reviewed learning rate and no weight decay.
loop_plan.expected_evidence: Optimizer class, learning rate, and weight decay logged.
loop_plan.failure_action: Abort if optimizer configuration differs from policy.
loop_plan.forbidden: Trainer, Lightning loop, saved optimizer state.
loop_plan.purpose: Create a conservative optimizer for the in-memory model.

loop_plan.allowed: Fixed seed, no shuffle, tiny max step count.
loop_plan.expected_evidence: Mask level per step and target/context counts.
loop_plan.failure_action: Abort on unexpected mask level or empty target mask.
loop_plan.forbidden: Random uncontrolled sampling for first dry run.
loop_plan.purpose: Use a deterministic A/B/B2/C cycle so every mask level is covered.

loop_plan.allowed: Forward, masked loss, backward, optimizer step, metrics logging.
loop_plan.expected_evidence: One row per step with loss, gradient, and parameter delta metrics.
loop_plan.failure_action: Stop immediately on any failed invariant.
loop_plan.forbidden: Formal training, checkpoint writing, trainer.fit, training_step.
loop_plan.purpose: Run only the explicitly capped number of dry-run steps.

loop_plan.expected_evidence: Finite loss fields for every step.
loop_plan.purpose: Record original and masked loss components for audit.

loop_plan.failure_action: Abort before optimizer step if gradients fail.
loop_plan.purpose: Record gradient norm, max abs, finite checks, and NaN/Inf counts.

loop_plan.expected_evidence: Finite nonzero parameter delta and post-step finite parameters.
loop_plan.failure_action: Abort if update is zero or non-finite.
loop_plan.forbidden: Saving model weights or optimizer state.
loop_plan.purpose: Record in-memory parameter delta after optimizer step.

loop_plan.expected_evidence: Stop reason and last safe step.
loop_plan.failure_action: Stop loop and write blocked report.
loop_plan.purpose: Apply hard stop conditions after every step.

loop_plan.allowed: CSV report, JSON preview manifest, Markdown summary.
loop_plan.failure_action: Delete disallowed outputs and mark blocked.
loop_plan.forbidden: Model files, checkpoint files, archives, tensor dumps.

loop_plan.allowed: Filesystem scan of dry-run output root.
loop_plan.failure_action: Mark blocked and remove forbidden outputs if any were created.
loop_plan.purpose: Confirm no checkpoint, model, tensor, or archive file was created.

loop_plan.expected_evidence: No diff in protected source paths.
loop_plan.purpose: Confirm DiffSBDD, equivariant_diffusion, and lightning_modules are unchanged.

mask_schedule_policy.rationale: Each mask level runs once first; this validates loop behavior and safety, not loss decrease.

risk_register.mitigation: Use a hard max_steps cap and report-only outputs; require explicit approval before any broader run.
risk_register.risk: Dry-run loop accidentally becomes formal training.

risk_register.mitigation: Scan output roots for forbidden suffixes and keep checkpoint/model saving disabled.
risk_register.risk: Checkpoint or model artifact is written unintentionally.

risk_register.mitigation: Abort on first non-finite loss, gradient, parameter, or missing target mask.
risk_register.risk: Masked loss is unstable for one mask level.

risk_register.mitigation: Require protected source diff checks before and after the few-step dry run.
risk_register.risk: Source-level behavior changes hide in the training loop step.

source_modification_policy.required_check: git diff -- equivariant_diffusion/ lightning_modules.py must be empty
